title: Creating a Checklist Summary/ Report across all boards
excerpt:
It would be great to have the facility to see ALL of the checklist items that relate to me in one place! 
The Updates Dashboard shows all updates - not possible to filter out Checklist items

posts.author: BelindaB1 (Belinda Brooks)
